title: Sakkarakottai Bird Sanctuary
tagline: Sakkarakottai Bird Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Sakkarakottai Bird Sanctuary is a bird sanctuary in Ramanathapuram district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.
overview.description: Sakkarakottai Bird Sanctuary is a bird sanctuary in Ramanathapuram district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Established in 2012, it is spread across an area of 230.49 ha (569.6 acres). It has been designated as a protected Ramsar site since 2024.

topPlaces.name: Ramanathapuram
topPlaces.description: Ramanathapuram (), also known as Ramnad, is a town in Ramanathapuram district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is the administrative headquarters of Ramanathapuram district and the second largest town (by population) in Ramanathapuram district.

topPlaces.name: Ramanathapuram division
topPlaces.description: Ramanathapuram division is a revenue division in the Ramanathapuram district of Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Ramanathapuram taluk
topPlaces.description: Ramanathapuram taluk is a taluk in the Ramanathapuram district of Tamil Nadu, India. The headquarters is the district seat of Ramanathapuram.

topPlaces.name: Panaikulam
topPlaces.description: Panaikulam or Panaikkulam is a village located in the eastern part of Ramanathapuram district, Tamil Nadu, India. The inhabitants of this village are primarily Tamil Muslims.

topPlaces.name: Palai park
topPlaces.description: Palai Park (Tamil: பாலை பூங்கா) is one among the two Genetic Heritage Gardens in Tamil Nadu (Palai Park at Achadiparambu, Ramanadhapuram and Kurinji Park at Yercaud, Salem). This park is maintained by the Department of Horticulture and Plantation Crops.

topPlaces.name: Chittarkottai
topPlaces.description: Chittarkottai is a Panchayat in Ramanathapuram district, Tamil Nadu, India. It has consists of seven villages with different faiths of religions people.

topPlaces.name: Athiyuthu
topPlaces.description: Athiyuthu is a village located 17 km(10 Miles) from the center of Ramanathapuram district, Tamil Nadu, India. It has some similar places nearby, such as Chittarkottai, Panaikulam, Pudhuvalasai Alagankulam and Aatrangarai.

items.note: Ramanathapuram (), also known as Ramnad, is a town in Ramanathapuram district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is the administrative headquarters of Ramanathapuram district and the second largest town (by population) in Ramanathapuram district.
Ramanathapuram division is a revenue division in the Ramanathapuram district of Tamil Nadu, India.
Ramanathapuram taluk is a taluk in the Ramanathapuram district of Tamil Nadu, India. The headquarters is the district seat of Ramanathapuram.
Panaikulam or Panaikkulam is a village located in the eastern part of Ramanathapuram district, Tamil Nadu, India. The inhabitants of this village are primarily Tamil Muslims.

Palai Park (Tamil: பாலை பூங்கா) is one among the two Genetic Heritage Gardens in Tamil Nadu (Palai Park at Achadiparambu, Ramanadhapuram and Kurinji Park at Yercaud, Salem). This park is maintained by the Department of Horticulture and Plantation Crops.
Chittarkottai is a Panchayat in Ramanathapuram district, Tamil Nadu, India. It has consists of seven villages with different faiths of religions people.

Athiyuthu is a village located 17 km(10 Miles) from the center of Ramanathapuram district, Tamil Nadu, India. It has some similar places nearby, such as Chittarkottai, Panaikulam, Pudhuvalasai Alagankulam and Aatrangarai.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sakkarakottai Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sakkarakottai Bird Sanctuary is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sakkarakottai Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Madurai Airport (99 km) and the nearest railway station is Madurai Junction (102 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sakkarakottai Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sakkarakottai Bird Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sakkarakottai Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Sakkarakottai Bird Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sakkarakottai Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Ramanathapuram, Ramanathapuram division, Ramanathapuram taluk, Panaikulam, Palai park.
